params.name: activityTypes[]
params.description: The activity types to query

params.name: fromTime
params.description: `From time` of time range to query

params.name: toTime
params.description: `To time` of time range to query

params.name: assetId
params.description: Asset Id to filter for activities. Either `assetId` or `collectionId` or `walletAddress` should be provided. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`

params.name: collectionId
params.description: Collection Id to filter for activities. Either `assetId` or `collectionId` or `walletAddress` should be provided. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`

params.name: walletAddress
params.description: User wallet address to filter for activities. Either `assetId` or `collectionId` or `walletAddress` should be provided. example: `0x47d88afbba889709abba07339ed1c88079944ca3`

params.name: limit
params.description: Amount of items returned, default to __20__

params.name: continuation
params.description: Use continuation token to request next offset of items.

items.docs: Use this API to get NFT activity
Use this API to explore a collection's metadata and statistics (sales, volume, etc).
Use this API to explore a user's collections metadata and statistics (sales, volume, etc).
Use this API to do a fuzzy collection search
Generate bids. This API is used to generate bid data to sign. Once you get signing data from this API, you shall sign them and post to another bid creation API to finish bid generation
Generate bids. This API is used to create bids with signature provided
Bulk transfer assets(tokens). This API is used to generate asset bulk transfer transaction data
Buy assets(tokens). This API is used to generate transaction data to buy assets

Cancel Orders. This API is used to generate order cancellation data to sign. Once you get signing data from this API, you shall sign them and post to another order cancellation API to finish order cancellation
Cancel Orders. This API is used to cancel orders with signature provided

Generate listings for assets (tokens). This API is used to generate listing data to sign. Once you get signing data from this API, you shall sign them and post to another listing creation API to finish listing generation
Generate listings for assets (tokens). This API is used to create listings with signature provided
Sell assets(tokens). This API is used to generate transaction data to sell assets

params.name: ids[]
params.description: Direct fetch asks by ids, other filters will be ignored if `ids` is provided. Either `ids` and `collectionId` must be provided

params.name: collectionId
params.description: Filter by collectionId. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`. Either `ids` and `collectionId` must be provided

params.name: assetIds[]
params.description: Filter by asset ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`

params.name: makers[]
params.description: Filter by makers who made these asks. example: `0x47d88afbba889709abba07339ed1c88079944ca3`

params.name: sources[]
params.description: Filter by order source.

params.name: status[]
params.description: Filter by order status. default `active`

params.name: createAfter
params.description: Filter orders after some create timestamp using UTC format. example: `2025-05-01T06:01:09.000Z`.

params.name: updateAfter
params.description: Filter orders after some update timestamp using UTC format. example: `2025-05-01T06:01:09.000Z`.

params.name: limit
params.description: Amount of items returned, default to __20__

params.name: continuation
params.description: Use continuation token to request next offset of items.

items.docs: Use this API to search asks

params.name: ids[]
params.description: Direct fetch bids by ids, other filters will be ignored if `ids` is provided. Either `ids` and `bidTypes[] + collectionId` must be provided

params.name: bidTypes[]
params.description: Filter by bid types

params.name: collectionId
params.description: Filter by collectionId. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`. Either `ids` and `collectionId` must be provided

params.name: assetIds[]
params.description: Filter by asset ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`

params.name: attributes[]
params.description: Filter by attributes, could be a list, format as `<attribute_name>:<attribute_value>`, example: `Background:Black`

params.name: makers[]
params.description: Filter by makers who made these bids. example: `0x47d88afbba889709abba07339ed1c88079944ca3`

params.name: sources[]
params.description: Filter by order source.

params.name: status[]
params.description: Filter by order status. default `active`

params.name: createAfter
params.description: Filter orders after some create timestamp using UTC format. example: `2025-05-01T06:01:09.000Z`.

params.name: updateAfter
params.description: Filter orders after some update timestamp using UTC format. example: `2025-05-01T06:01:09.000Z`.

params.name: limit
params.description: Amount of items returned, default to __20__

params.name: continuation
params.description: Use continuation token to request next offset of items.

items.docs: Use this API to search bids

params.name: collectionId
params.description: The collection id to query assets. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`

params.name: assetIds[]
params.description: Filter assets by ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`

params.name: includeFloorAskSource[]
params.description: Filter assets whose floor ask is from specific sources. if `any` is specified, means return assets which are listed only

params.name: name
params.description: Filter assets by its name

params.name: includeTopBid
params.description: Whether to include top bid for returned assets, default to __false__

params.name: limit
params.description: Amount of items returned, default to __20__

params.name: continuation
params.description: Use continuation token to request next offset of assets.

items.docs: Use this API to explore a collection's assets and its market info

params.name: walletAddresses[]
params.description: The wallet address (user address) to query assets from, could be a list, example: `0x47d88afbba889709abba07339ed1c88079944ca3`

params.name: assetIds[]
params.description: Filter assets by ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`

params.name: collectionIds[]
params.description: Filter assets by collectionIds. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`

params.name: onlyListed
params.description: Whether to show only listed assets, default to __false__

params.name: includeTopBid
params.description: Whether to include top bid for returned assets, default to __false__

params.name: limit
params.description: Amount of items returned, default to __20__

params.name: continuation
params.description: Use continuation token to request next offset of assets.

items.docs: Use this API to explore a user's assets and its market info
